modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to enable polling feature in Zoom meetings.

full_description_text:
- The user is trying to activate the polling feature for their Zoom meetings.  
- They are unsure of the steps required to enable this functionality.  
- This issue may affect their ability to engage participants effectively during sessions.  
- The user is seeking guidance on how to proceed with enabling polling in their Zoom environment.
